title: ‘Suddenly, I Was Free’: A Chinese Pastor’s Journey From Jail to the U.S.
summary_full: In his first interview since being released by China, Pastor Ezra Jin Mingri details his surprise release after a direct appeal by President Trump to Xi Jinping.
summary_public: In his first interview since being released by China, Pastor Ezra Jin Mingri details his surprise release after a direct appeal by President Trump to Xi Jinping.
